title: lithagrostis lacryma-jobi
intro: Lithagrostis lacryma-jobi, also known as Job's tears or barley grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant's seeds, also known as barleys, have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lithagrostis lacryma-jobi include the potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders such as diarrhea and constipation. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often dried and used as a dietary supplement, or made into a decoction by boiling them in water, to harness their medicinal properties.
